description_long: This handbag features a rectangular body with a wide, flat base and gently rounded corners, providing a spacious interior. The exterior is adorned with a vibrant tie-dye pattern in shades of blue, green, yellow, and pink, forming symmetrical horizontal bands across the front and back. The bag is equipped with two long, matching shoulder straps that are attached with gold-tone hardware, allowing for comfortable carrying over the shoulder. The top of the bag appears to have a zipper closure, ensuring the contents are secure. The material has a smooth, slightly glossy finish, suggesting a synthetic or coated fabric construction. There are no visible external pockets or additional decorative elements beyond the colorful pattern.
description: A rectangular handbag with a vibrant tie-dye pattern and two long shoulder straps, featuring a smooth, slightly glossy finish and gold-tone hardware.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full tie-dye pattern, both shoulder straps, and gold-tone hardware attachments.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the slim profile of the bag and the continuation of the tie-dye pattern on the straps and side panel.
description_view_2: Back view mirroring the front, with the same tie-dye pattern and strap arrangement visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and strap design, similar to view 1.
attribute_strap_type: Two long, non-adjustable shoulder straps attached with gold-tone hardware at the top sides.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Zipper closure located at the top opening of the bag.
attribute_pattern: Symmetrical tie-dye pattern with horizontal bands in blue, green, yellow, and pink.
